english: We worship the three-eyed Shiva who is fragrant and nourishes all beings
roman: Om Tryambakam yajamahe sugandhim pushti vardhanam

english: May he liberate us from death as a cucumber from its vine — not from immortality

hindi: रुद्राय नमः। शर्वाय नमः। पशुपतये नमः।
english: Salutations to Rudra. Salutations to Sharva. Salutations to Pashupati
roman: Rudraya namah. Sharvaya namah. Pashupataye namah

english: Salutations to the blue-throated one. Salutations to Shitikantha
roman: Nilagriv aya namah. Shiti kanthaya namah

english: The pure person who chants the great Mrityunjaya mantra daily
roman: Maha mrityunjaya mantram japen nityam shuchirnara

hindi: मृत्योः मोचनं प्राप्नोति शिवलोकं च गच्छति॥
english: Attains liberation from death and goes to the world of Shiva
roman: Mrityoh mochanam prapnoti Shivalokam cha gachcha

english: Salutations to Mrityunjaya, the three-eyed one, the lord of Gauri
O Mahadeva, be our benefactor — salutations to the lord of Bhavani
roman: Bhava bhava Mahadeva Bhavanee pataye namah
